CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-24-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Sep-30-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Bruce Chan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Kerry Duffy, Esq. for Plaintiff One Embarcadero Center Venture, a California gereral partnership.
Plaintiff's Witnee Norm Dito, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant Great States, Inc., a corporation dba Gia & Co., as follows:
Damages $55,336.00
Attorney Fees $6,417.50
Costs $465.00, for a total of $62,218.50
Judgment signed in open court.
